inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar hai aur thakawat mehsoos ho rahi hai, sar bhi dard kar raha hai
Mujhe dry cough ho raha hai, shaayad bronchitis ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Unlikely, no weight loss or night sweats

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, khansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Cardinal symptoms of night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, given the new symptoms

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely than Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe ab bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, balgam mein khoon bhi aaya hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Confirmation of Tuberculosis with worsening symptoms

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, given the prolonged and severe symptoms

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, given the lack of pneumonia-specific symptoms
